layman_headline: Fear dominates crypto markets — no strong setups worth risking capital on right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a fearful state with most altcoins stuck in downtrends and Bitcoin dominance squeezing alternative coins. While a few coins like TRUMP show deeply oversold readings, their charts are still pointing down with no reversal confirmation. Ethereum is the closest to offering a quality entry but needs to hold its $1,800 support and show a clear bounce before committing money. Patience is the best trade right now.
layman_action: Wait on the sidelines. If Ethereum dips to the $1,790-$1,810 range and shows a strong bounce with rising volume, that could be the entry worth taking. Don't chase anything in this fearful market.
expert_reasoning: Every candidate on the watchlist has significant headwinds. B and PUMP have surged 126% and 35% in 7 days respectively — chasing extended moves contradicts swing trading discipline. BONK has a -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — that's a falling knife. TRUMP's RSI at 22 is deeply oversold (a reliable signal per our credibility data at 80% win rate), but the 1:1 risk/reward ratio and bearish chart structure make it a poor risk-adjusted entry. LDO has the strongest chart (+0.85 bias, Three White Soldiers) but RSI is already at 59 after a 51.7% 5-day move with only 0.38x risk/reward — terrible entry timing. ETH at RSI 39 with $1,800 support nearby is the best candidate, but needs a confirmed bounce at support before entry. High BTC dominance at 56.5% continues to pressure altcoins broadly.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.5% could continue rising, further crushing altcoin performance
Fear & Greed at 28 could deteriorate further — fear often begets more fear before capitulation
GENIUS Act regulatory uncertainty around stablecoins could trigger unexpected market-wide selling
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a strong bounce with volume confirms the trade
TRUMP RSI — if it drops below 20 with a hammer candle at $1.50 support, that becomes actionable
BTC dominance trend — any reversal below 56% would signal altcoin rotation beginning
market_context: Crypto markets are in a fearful, risk-off environment with BTC dominance at 56.5% crushing altcoins. BTC is flat while most alts bleed — classic late-cycle dominance squeeze that requires patience before alt entries.
context_banner: All candidates show bearish structures or overextended moves — discipline demands waiting for confirmed reversals at key support levels.

key_signals.description: TRUMP RSI at 22 is deeply oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but poor risk/reward ratio of 1:1 prevents entry — watching for improvement.
Fear & Greed at 28 ('Fear') with flat trend suggests market hasn't capitulated yet — historically a zone where patience pays more than aggression.
ETH derivatives reset article suggests leveraged positions are being flushed — this clearing of excess positioning often precedes tradable bounces.
GENIUS Act stablecoin rules deadline missed by US agencies — regulatory overhang creates uncertainty but eventual clarity could be bullish catalyst.
LDO shows Three White Soldiers (+0.85 bias) but 0.38x risk/reward after 51.7% 5-day surge makes entry timing poor — need pullback to $0.30 support.
